description.initial: The cave opens onto a rocky outcrop. To one side, the Enchanted Forest spreads far below. To the other, Nephelia drifts among the clouds - close enough to see its golden domes. A cold wind carries the smell of higher snow.
description.return: The mountain peak viewpoint. Nephelia floats majestically to the east.
description.atmospheric: The wind sings through the rocky crags. You feel on top of the world.

east.blockedMessage: The gap between the mountain and Nephelia is too great to cross on foot. You need another way to reach the floating city.

interactables.name: Viewpoint
interactables.examineText: A flat rock formation creates a natural viewing platform. From here, you can see for miles in every direction.
interactables.interactionText: You stand on the platform and take in the view. The world seems so vast from here, full of wonders waiting to be discovered. Somewhere out there is the Island of Bliss. Somewhere out there is your father.

interactables.name: Alpine Flowers
interactables.examineText: Tough flowers cling to cracks in the rock, their bright colors defying the harsh mountain conditions. Life persists even here.
